description: Implement src/handlers/health.ts per planning.md. Make healthHistoryDir fully configurable via config. Critical fallback: when no health-history directory exists, compute a CEM-derived documentation score from 6 dimensions — description present (+15), all properties have descriptions (+25), all events have type annotations (+20), all events have descriptions (+15), CSS parts documented (+15), slots documented (+10). Full 17-dimension score requires pre-computed history files in healthHistoryDir. getHealthTrend: reads history JSON files sorted by date, computes trend direction (improving/declining/stable) and changePercent — single data point = stable. getHealthDiff: uses GitOperations.withBranch to compare current vs base branch score. Write tests/handlers/health.test.ts FIRST using fixture health-history/ files. Cover: CEM fallback scoring, trend with multiple data points, trend with single point (stable), diff improving vs declining.
title: Health handler — scoreComponent, scoreAllComponents, getHealthTrend, getHealthDiff

descriptionHistory.description: Adapt src/handlers/health.ts from Helix health-scorer/handlers.ts. Key adaptation: make healthHistoryDir configurable via config. Critical fallback: when no health-history directory exists, compute a CEM-derived documentation score from 6 dimensions (description present +15, all properties have descriptions +25, all events have type annotations +20, all events have descriptions +15, CSS parts documented +15, slots documented +10). Full 17-dimension score requires pre-computed history files. getHealthTrend reads history JSON files sorted by date, computes trend direction (improving/declining/stable) and change percent. getHealthDiff compares current branch score vs base branch score using GitOperations. Write tests/handlers/health.test.ts FIRST — test CEM fallback scoring with fixture component, test trend calculation with fixture history files, test diff using fixture data for two time points.
